title: Default Args
description: Set fallback values for function parameters to make them optional for the caller.
problemStatement:
Optional choices! Create a function `greet(name: string, greeting: string = 'Hello')`. If the second argument is missing, it should use 'Hello'.

**Requirement:** Use the `=` operator in the parameter list to provide the default value.
hints: Default parameters automatically make that argument optional when calling the function.
